name: native-select
description: Token-styled wrapper around the native <select> element: PARTIAL tier, zero JS, zero enhancer, full platform a11y for free. WAI-ARIA APG Listbox (native) -- the platform supplies role=listbox, all keyboard interaction (Tab, arrows, Home/End, type-ahead), and accessible-name binding. Three option-authoring paths with explicit precedence: content slot (hand-authored <option>/<optgroup>, value!=label) > optionGroups (Map of String to String-list, rendered as native <optgroup>) > options (flat List<String>, value==label). Height-based size scale (sm/md/lg; 'default' is back-compat alias of 'md') aligns flush with button and input of the same size in a toolbar row. Invalid state: aria-invalid + destructive border + ring (color-mix in oklch). Wire binding via l:model on the native <select> (change event -> WIRE field setter); null = plain form POST, zero JS. No attrs trusted-raw channel (no per-row dynamic wire action on this partial). CSP-clean: no inline script, no on* handler.
docs: Copies the native-select partial to your JTE root at lievit/native-select.jte, reached as @template.lievit.native-select(name=...). Pass options (flat List<String>, value==label), optionGroups (Map of String to List<String>, renders native <optgroup>), or a content slot of hand-authored <option>/<optgroup> markup (value!=label, per-option disabled); content wins over optionGroups wins over options. Pass label for a real <label for> above the control (preferred accessible-name path) or ariaLabel for a label-free context. Pass placeholder for a disabled hidden first option (the native 'choose...' idiom). size (sm=32px, md=36px default, lg=40px; 'default' is back-compat alias of 'md') is height-based so the select lines up flush with a button and input of the same size in a toolbar. invalid=true adds aria-invalid + destructive border + ring. model binds the native change event to a WIRE field via l:model; null means plain form POST. Requires the icon partial for the decorative chevron-down indicator. The source is yours: edit freely.
